question_text: Read the passage given below. Which statement best captures the narrator's attitude towards books?

answer_key.explanation: The narrator describes books with wonder and longing, showing a strong appreciation for them.
common_mistakes: Confusing the narrator's nostalgia with rejection.
answer_key.related_concept: Identifying a narrator's attitude in prose

visual.caption: Numbered passage from a Beehive prose chapter.
visual.altText: A five-line numbered passage describing a child encountering an old printed book for the first time.

spec.title: On Old Books
spec.source: Adapted from a Beehive prose chapter

lines.text: She opened the book and turned the pages.
The pages were yellow and crinkly,
and it was awfully funny to read words that stood still
instead of moving the way they were supposed to —
